entity.summary: Order-book-based decentralized exchange on Vaulta, offering self-directed spot markets, market discovery, trading, and liquidity interfaces through its current first-party web application.
entity.notes: The current first-party site explicitly identifies 1DEX as a high-performance order-book-based decentralized exchange and exposes current markets, trade, and liquidity routes. No exact initial launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: 1DEX official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party site identifies 1DEX as an order-book-based decentralized exchange and links current market, trading, and liquidity surfaces.

evidence.title: 1DEX markets
evidence.notes: Current first-party markets route confirms the exchange's active market-discovery and order-book trading surface.
